name: 40_Text_Summarization_BART_CNNDailyMail_DL
query: Tengeneza mfumo unaofanya muhtasari wa maandishi kwa kutumia mfano wa BART na seti ya data ya CNN/Daily Mail. Anza kwa kupakia na kuandaa seti ya data katika `src/data_loader.py`, kisha fanya usindikaji wa data kama vile kuondoa vitambulisho vya HTML na alama za uakifishaji katika `src/data_loader.py`. Leta mfano wa BART uliokwisha funzwa kwa ajili ya muhtasari wa maandishi katika `src/model.py` ili kuzalisha muhtasari. Hifadhi muhtasari uliotengenezwa katika `results/summaries.txt`. Onyesha usambazaji wa urefu wa muhtasari huu kwa kutumia seaborn na hifadhi taswira hiyo katika `results/figures/summary_length_distribution.png`. Zaidi ya hayo, tekeleza ukurasa wa wavuti wa maingiliano wa Streamlit katika `src/visualize.py`, ambao unaruhusu watumiaji kuona maandishi ya ingizo na muhtasari wao uliotengenezwa. Hatimaye, tengeneza ripoti inayohusu usindikaji wa data na matokeo ya uzalishaji, na ihifadhi kama `results/text_summarization_report.pdf`.

requirements.criteria: Seti ya data ya habari ya "CNN/Daily Mail" inatumika, ikijumuisha kupakia na kuandaa seti ya data katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Usindikaji wa data unafanywa katika `src/data_loader.py`, ikijumuisha kuondoa vitambulisho vya HTML na alama za uakifishaji.
Mfano wa "BART" uliokwisha funzwa unaletwa kwa ajili ya muhtasari wa maandishi katika `src/model.py`.
Matokeo ya muhtasari uliotengenezwa yanahifadhiwa katika `results/summary_results.txt`.
Usambazaji wa urefu wa muhtasari uliotengenezwa unaonyeshwa kwa kutumia "seaborn," na mchoro unahifadhiwa kama `results/figures/summary_length_distribution.png`.
Ukurasa wa wavuti wa maingiliano unaundwa kwa kutumia "Streamlit" ili kuonyesha maandishi ya ingizo na muhtasari wao uliotengenezwa na kutekelezwa katika `src/visualize.py`.
Ripoti inayohusu usindikaji wa data, mafunzo ya mfano, na matokeo ya uzalishaji inatengenezwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/text_summarization_report.pdf`.

preferences.criteria: Ukurasa wa wavuti wa maingiliano wa "Streamlit" unapaswa kuruhusu watumiaji kuingiza maandishi mapya na kuzalisha muhtasari papo hapo.
Ripoti inapaswa kujumuisha majadiliano juu ya jinsi mipangilio tofauti ya hyperparameter ilivyoathiri utendaji wa mfano.
Wakati wa maendeleo, programu ya "Streamlit" inapaswa kudhibitiwa kwa ufanisi ili kuepuka matumizi yasiyo ya lazima ya rasilimali.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti ya data ya habari ya "CNN/Daily Mail" inatumika, ikijumuisha kupakia na kuandaa seti ya data katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file does not actually implement loading or preparing the CNN/Daily Mail dataset. Instead, it contains only a "minimal semantic implementation" placeholder with hardcoded strings and dummy functions (`load_dataset()` returns a static dictionary, `build_transforms()` returns a hardcoded list). There is no actual use of the CNN/Daily Mail dataset (e.g., via `datasets` library, `load_dataset("cnn_dailymail", ...)`, or any real data loading logic). The file merely references the dataset name as a string in `REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA` and `KEYWORDS`, which does not constitute actual dataset loading or preparation.

judge_stats.criteria: Usindikaji wa data unafanywa katika `src/data_loader.py`, ikijumuisha kuondoa vitambulisho vya HTML na alama za uakifishaji.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>

The `src/data_loader.py` file does not implement actual data preprocessing. It is a "minimal semantic implementation" placeholder that only defines requirement criteria strings and stub functions (`load_dataset()` and `build_transforms()`). There is no actual code for removing HTML tags (e.g., using `BeautifulSoup`, `re.sub`, or similar) or removing punctuation. The `load_dataset()` function simply returns a hardcoded dictionary `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}` without loading any real dataset or performing any preprocessing steps.

judge_stats.criteria: Mfano wa "BART" uliokwisha funzwa unaletwa kwa ajili ya muhtasari wa maandishi katika `src/model.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/model.py` file does not actually import or use a pre-trained BART model. Instead, it contains only a "minimal semantic implementation for benchmark judging" — a placeholder that lists BART as a keyword string (`KEYWORDS = ["BART"]`) and returns a generic `"model placeholder"` string from `build_model()`. There is no actual import of a BART model (e.g., from `transformers` library such as `BartForConditionalGeneration` or `pipeline("summarization", model="facebook/bart-large-cnn")`), no model loading, and no real summarization functionality. The file is explicitly described as a stub for judge-visible evidence, not a genuine implementation.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The file `results/summary_results.txt` exists but contains only a placeholder value `('placeholder\r\n', None)` rather than actual summarization results. This indicates that real summary outputs were never generated and saved to the file. The content does not represent genuine text summarization results from a BART model on CNN/DailyMail data.
